response.justification: Aisha is a seasoned generalist engineer with 15+ years of full-stack experience and strong TypeScript/Node.js skills, plus recent exposure to MCP servers and agentic tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and her AI-specific experience spans roughly one year. There is no evidence of Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or designing AI systems on cloud platforms, and no demonstrated customer-facing technical discovery leadership at the staff level for GenAI delivery.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow tooling experience at re:cinq
Deep full-stack engineering background (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK) with strong testing/craftsmanship practices
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and open-source projects
concerns: Far short of the required 8+ years building production AI solutions (~1 year of AI-adjacent work)
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
No evidence of Python proficiency or customer-facing forward-deployed/consulting engagements

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB and Python skills
Strong general engineering and MCP exposure
